EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An update of a Dr.Web Server is initiated on host {event_src.host}
Failed to start a Dr.Web Server on host {event_src.host}
Failed to stop a Dr.Web Server on host {event_src.host}
A Dr.Web Server is stopped on host {event_src.host}
Failed to update a Dr.Web Server on host {event_src.host}
A Dr.Web Server is updated on host {event_src.host}
A Dr.Web Server is started on host {event_src.host}
